textByHash.2f32f77c08f6fecc7d26bbb0c05f402b6e22651a: I'm offering my services as a guide, for a price. The price in this case, is knowledge!
textByHash.315b6854514d0c918c28fec3637d7c5f03367ae1: The sea has been getting quite busy all of a sudden. I surfaced to see what the fuss was about and found that lots of you seem interested in diving down to the sea floor.
textByHash.54908efd11a9f7b8588e1323216ebe0b6b1ff51b: You need to be wearing deep sea diving equipment to dive with me!
textByHash.5a70c11af4aede8de29af4b68361a28d333c5ef5: There you go. Hope the dive got you everything you needed!
textByHash.6f60b3315d24b750e6ac297eed495cb62c31c98d: I don't think that's right... You should try again.
textByHash.891929002ec50cd1c696a5204dbcafc896fb691d: I'd like to try making some of your land food. Can you tell me the raw ingredients and tools I need to make an apple pie? Don't worry about water. I have plenty of that.
textByHash.aeeb3950f768347142753dbdbc080bb174e0a2a8: I want something in return if you're going to dive with me...
textByHash.cdacfe4f6ac8c8f1ad864fd78ce5e0600bd186e0: This puzzle has three answers and you'll need to tell me all of them.
textByHash.f90797ed66cc947d452b1c72bc41c33d0dc6c7da: I don't think you are practised enough to dive here. I don't want you getting swept away!
